name: Matar Paneer (Peas with Paneer)
recipeIngredient: 1 1-inch cube fresh ginger, peeled and chopped
⅛ teaspoon freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the chopped onion and ginger into a blender or food processor with 1/3 cup water. Blend until smooth. Leave the paste in the container.
2. Heat the oil in a heavy, 10-inch-wide pot (preferably teflon-lined) over medium flame. When hot, add paneer (or tofu) pieces in a single layer and fry until golden brown on all sides. This takes only a few moments. Using a slotted spoon, remove fried paneer to a plate.
3. Add the dried red pepper to the oil. Within 2 seconds, flip it so both sides brown. Return the contents of the blender (avoid splatter) into the pot. Fry, stirring constantly, for 10-12 minutes until the paste turns light brown.
4. Stir in coriander and turmeric; cook another minute.
5. Add minced tomatoes. Cook, stirring, for an additional 3 to 4 minutes until they become dark reddish brown.
6. Pour in 2 cups of whey (or water if tofu is used). Add salt and black pepper. Mix well and bring to a boil.
7. Lower heat and simmer gently covered for 10 minutes. Uncover, add paneer pieces and peas. Cover again and simmer for another 10 minutes until peas are cooked.
